MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-06-2021 IN 206, DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. MARK BRAINICH, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/24/21 IS CONTINUED TO 10/18/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. PARTIES MAY APPEAR IN PERSON OR BY COURTCALL ON 10/18/21. DEFENDANT WAIVED NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND PREVAILING PARTY TO SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66986568) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA
